excerpt: In this post, we explore how Amazon Bedrock Data Automation can accurately extract information from four common types of financial documents: bank statements, W-2 forms, 1099-B tax forms, and vendor contracts. We highlight the complexity in the documents, detail the custom extraction created in Amazon Bedrock Data Automation, and describe the outcomes of the extraction process.

title: Process financial documents using Amazon Bedrock Data Automation
